paragraphs.source: RL is highly effective at teaching models to use tools. Through using open-source tooling, some startups now offer tailored RL services to large enterprises. The space is comprised of smaller YC startups like RunRL and Osmosis, but also ones started by experienced researchers like Applied Compute and Adaptive ML.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: RL is highly effective at teaching models to use tools. Through using open-source tooling, some startups now offer tailored RL services to large enterprises. The space is comprised of smaller YC startups like RunRL and Osmosis, but also ones started by experienced researchers like Applied Compute and Adaptive ML.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: RL is highly effective at teaching models to use tools. Through using open-source tooling, some startups now offer tailored RL services to large enterprises. The space is comprised of smaller YC startups like RunRL and Osmosis, but also ones started by experienced researchers like Applied Compute and Adaptive ML.

pro.text: RL在教导模型使用工具方面极为有效。通过利用开源工具，一些初创公司现在为大型企业提供定制化的RL服务。这一领域既有像RunRL和Osmosis这样较小的YC初创公司，也有由经验丰富的研究者创立的公司，例如Applied Compute和Adaptive ML。

issues.description: 术语‘dense models’译为‘稠密模型’在中文AI语境中虽可理解，但更常见、更精确的译法是‘密集模型’。‘稠密’在中文中更常用于描述物理性质（如稠密液体），而‘密集’在计算领域（如密集连接、密集计算）更普遍。
‘MCP’在文中首次出现，但未提供英文全称或解释。虽然目标读者是业内人士，但MCP并非像RL那样广为人知的核心术语，不加注可能造成理解障碍。

原文‘5x less compared to what it would cost on OpenAI's platform’译为‘比OpenAI平台低5倍的成本’存在歧义。中文‘低5倍’通常指成本是原来的1/5（即降低80%），但英文‘5x less’有时可能被误解为成本是原来的1/6（降低约83.3%）。虽然常见用法中‘5倍’多指乘数关系，但为绝对精确，应明确表达为成本是OpenAI的几分之一。
句子‘Anthropic 可能会通过其 API 开放这项服务，但同时也像 OpenAI 一样，正在积极招聘“前线部署工程师”…’结构稍显松散，将‘通过API开放’和‘招聘工程师’两个并列动作用‘但也’连接，转折关系不强。可以调整语序，使逻辑更紧凑，更符合中文分析性文本的节奏。
术语‘memory bound’译为‘受内存限制’准确。但‘总拥有成本’是‘Total Cost of Ownership (TCO)’的标准译法，此处使用正确。整句表述清晰。

原文‘All three have more success then OpenAI and Anthropic so far in this market.’ 译文‘迄今为止，这三家公司在该市场上都比 OpenAI 和 Anthropic 取得了更大的成功。’ 将‘then’处理为比较级‘than’是正确的（原文疑似笔误）。但‘更大的成功’表述稍显绝对，原文‘more success’是比较级，译文准确。需确保比较对象是OpenAI和Anthropic的RFT服务，而非这两家公司的整体。结合上下文，此意已隐含。

paragraphs.source: Often, Qwen models are used for this as they are easy to post-train and require little resources to run. Qwen has a variety of models, including small dense ones, which require less skill and set up.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Often, Qwen models are used for this as they are easy to post-train and require little resources to run. Qwen has a variety of models, including small dense ones, which require less skill and set up.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Often, Qwen models are used for this as they are easy to post-train and require little resources to run. Qwen has a variety of models, including small dense ones, which require less skill and set up.

pro.text: 通义千问模型常被用于此目的，因为它们易于进行后训练，且运行所需资源较少。通义千问拥有多种模型，包括小型密集模型，这些模型对技能和配置的要求较低。

issues.description: 术语‘dense models’译为‘稠密模型’在中文AI语境中虽可理解，但更常见、更精确的译法是‘密集模型’。‘稠密’在中文中更常用于描述物理性质（如稠密液体），而‘密集’在计算领域（如密集连接、密集计算）更普遍。
‘MCP’在文中首次出现，但未提供英文全称或解释。虽然目标读者是业内人士，但MCP并非像RL那样广为人知的核心术语，不加注可能造成理解障碍。

原文‘5x less compared to what it would cost on OpenAI's platform’译为‘比OpenAI平台低5倍的成本’存在歧义。中文‘低5倍’通常指成本是原来的1/5（即降低80%），但英文‘5x less’有时可能被误解为成本是原来的1/6（降低约83.3%）。虽然常见用法中‘5倍’多指乘数关系，但为绝对精确，应明确表达为成本是OpenAI的几分之一。
句子‘Anthropic 可能会通过其 API 开放这项服务，但同时也像 OpenAI 一样，正在积极招聘“前线部署工程师”…’结构稍显松散，将‘通过API开放’和‘招聘工程师’两个并列动作用‘但也’连接，转折关系不强。可以调整语序，使逻辑更紧凑，更符合中文分析性文本的节奏。
术语‘memory bound’译为‘受内存限制’准确。但‘总拥有成本’是‘Total Cost of Ownership (TCO)’的标准译法，此处使用正确。整句表述清晰。

原文‘All three have more success then OpenAI and Anthropic so far in this market.’ 译文‘迄今为止，这三家公司在该市场上都比 OpenAI 和 Anthropic 取得了更大的成功。’ 将‘then’处理为比较级‘than’是正确的（原文疑似笔误）。但‘更大的成功’表述稍显绝对，原文‘more success’是比较级，译文准确。需确保比较对象是OpenAI和Anthropic的RFT服务，而非这两家公司的整体。结合上下文，此意已隐含。

paragraphs.source: After custom post-training, these models run on rented hardware. Currently, Baseten serves many these small, custom models. Typical targets include Salesforce and AWS Terminal and creating or closing Jira tickets. It is also possible to get models to be reliable at using MCPs, for example to extract data from SEC filings.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: After custom post-training, these models run on rented hardware. Currently, Baseten serves many these small, custom models. Typical targets include Salesforce and AWS Terminal and creating or closing Jira tickets. It is also possible to get models to be reliable at using MCPs, for example to extract data from SEC filings.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: After custom post-training, these models run on rented hardware. Currently, Baseten serves many these small, custom models. Typical targets include Salesforce and AWS Terminal and creating or closing Jira tickets. It is also possible to get models to be reliable at using MCPs, for example to extract data from SEC filings.

pro.text: 经过定制的后训练后，这些模型在租用的硬件上运行。目前，Baseten平台承载了许多这类小型定制模型。典型的目标任务包括处理Salesforce和AWS Terminal，以及创建或关闭Jira工单。此外，也可以让模型可靠地使用MCP（模型上下文协议），例如从SEC文件中提取数据。

paragraphs.source: These RL as a service startup are joined by the labs, with OpenAI recently spinning up a “Reinforcement Fine Tuning” (RFT) service. OpenAI RFT’s goal is to let any customer with sufficient data RL an OpenAI model so it is tuned to the customer’s tasks and domains.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: These RL as a service startup are joined by the labs, with OpenAI recently spinning up a “Reinforcement Fine Tuning” (RFT) service. OpenAI RFT’s goal is to let any customer with sufficient data RL an OpenAI model so it is tuned to the customer’s tasks and domains.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: These RL as a service startup are joined by the labs, with OpenAI recently spinning up a “Reinforcement Fine Tuning” (RFT) service. OpenAI RFT’s goal is to let any customer with sufficient data RL an OpenAI model so it is tuned to the customer’s tasks and domains.

pro.text: 这些提供“RL即服务”的初创公司正与各大实验室同台竞技，OpenAI最近就推出了“强化微调”服务。OpenAI RFT的目标是让任何拥有足够数据的客户都能对OpenAI模型进行RL训练，从而使其适应客户的具体任务和领域。

paragraphs.source: In practice, the service has fallen short. We believe it is unstable and too expensive for most customers. As such, we are seeing demand for these services mostly flow to young startups. These young, YC companies do not have strong margins. Indeed, they often lose money. However, they are able to serve users at 5x less compared to what it would cost on OpenAI’s platform, gaining market share.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: In practice, the service has fallen short. We believe it is unstable and too expensive for most customers. As such, we are seeing demand for these services mostly flow to young startups. These young, YC companies do not have strong margins. Indeed, they often lose money. However, they are able to serve users at 5x less compared to what it would cost on OpenAI’s platform, gaining market share.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: In practice, the service has fallen short. We believe it is unstable and too expensive for most customers. As such, we are seeing demand for these services mostly flow to young startups. These young, YC companies do not have strong margins. Indeed, they often lose money. However, they are able to serve users at 5x less compared to what it would cost on OpenAI’s platform, gaining market share.

pro.text: 然而在实践中，该服务并未达到预期。我们认为它不够稳定，且对大多数客户而言过于昂贵。因此，我们看到对这些服务的需求主要流向了年轻的初创公司。这些年轻的YC公司利润率不高，甚至经常亏损。但它们能够以仅为OpenAI平台成本1/5的价格为用户提供服务，从而获取市场份额。

paragraphs.source: In the longer term, this will change. OpenAI’s is targeting large enterprises who can spend millions, and in the aggregate, the labs will capture most of the revenue. For OpenAI, this will be done through the “Strategic Deployment” team, whose goal is to work directly with a customer to build custom models. OpenAI was early to bet on this service as an enterprise use case, and enterprise growth outpaced consumer in 2025 for the company.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: In the longer term, this will change. OpenAI’s is targeting large enterprises who can spend millions, and in the aggregate, the labs will capture most of the revenue. For OpenAI, this will be done through the “Strategic Deployment” team, whose goal is to work directly with a customer to build custom models. OpenAI was early to bet on this service as an enterprise use case, and **enterprise** growth outpaced consumer in 2025 for the company.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: In the longer term, this will change. OpenAI’s is targeting large enterprises who can spend millions, and in the aggregate, the labs will capture most of the revenue. For OpenAI, this will be done through the “Strategic Deployment” team, whose goal is to work directly with a customer to build custom models. OpenAI was early to bet on this service as an enterprise use case, and enterprise growth outpaced consumer in 2025 for the company.

pro.text: 从长远来看，这种情况将会改变。OpenAI的目标是那些能花费数百万美元的大型企业；总体而言，各大实验室将攫取大部分营收。对OpenAI而言，这将通过其“战略部署”团队来实现，该团队的目标是直接与客户合作构建定制模型。OpenAI很早就将此项服务作为企业用例进行押注，并且该公司在2025年的企业业务增长已超过消费者业务。

术语‘dense models’译为‘稠密模型’在中文AI语境中虽可理解，但更常见、更精确的译法是‘密集模型’。‘稠密’在中文中更常用于描述物理性质（如稠密液体），而‘密集’在计算领域（如密集连接、密集计算）更普遍。
‘MCP’在文中首次出现，但未提供英文全称或解释。虽然目标读者是业内人士，但MCP并非像RL那样广为人知的核心术语，不加注可能造成理解障碍。

原文‘5x less compared to what it would cost on OpenAI's platform’译为‘比OpenAI平台低5倍的成本’存在歧义。中文‘低5倍’通常指成本是原来的1/5（即降低80%），但英文‘5x less’有时可能被误解为成本是原来的1/6（降低约83.3%）。虽然常见用法中‘5倍’多指乘数关系，但为绝对精确，应明确表达为成本是OpenAI的几分之一。
句子‘Anthropic 可能会通过其 API 开放这项服务，但同时也像 OpenAI 一样，正在积极招聘“前线部署工程师”…’结构稍显松散，将‘通过API开放’和‘招聘工程师’两个并列动作用‘但也’连接，转折关系不强。可以调整语序，使逻辑更紧凑，更符合中文分析性文本的节奏。
术语‘memory bound’译为‘受内存限制’准确。但‘总拥有成本’是‘Total Cost of Ownership (TCO)’的标准译法，此处使用正确。整句表述清晰。

原文‘All three have more success then OpenAI and Anthropic so far in this market.’ 译文‘迄今为止，这三家公司在该市场上都比 OpenAI 和 Anthropic 取得了更大的成功。’ 将‘then’处理为比较级‘than’是正确的（原文疑似笔误）。但‘更大的成功’表述稍显绝对，原文‘more success’是比较级，译文准确。需确保比较对象是OpenAI和Anthropic的RFT服务，而非这两家公司的整体。结合上下文，此意已隐含。

paragraphs.source: Anthropic is also entering the game. We believe Anthropic has its own RFT-like service that is more stable and more sample-efficient than OpenAI’s. Anthropic might expose it through the API, but is also actively hiring “Forward Deployed Engineers,” as OpenAI does, presumably serving the same function as the strategic deployment team at OpenAI.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Anthropic is also entering the game. We believe Anthropic has its own RFT-like service that is more stable and more sample-efficient than OpenAI’s. Anthropic might expose it through the API, but is also actively hiring “Forward Deployed Engineers,” as OpenAI does, presumably serving the same function as the strategic deployment team at OpenAI.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Anthropic is also entering the game. We believe Anthropic has its own RFT-like service that is more stable and more sample-efficient than OpenAI’s. Anthropic might expose it through the API, but is also actively hiring “Forward Deployed Engineers,” as OpenAI does, presumably serving the same function as the strategic deployment team at OpenAI.

pro.text: Anthropic 也正在加入这场竞争。我们认为，Anthropic 拥有其自研的、类似于 RFT 的服务，该服务比 OpenAI 的版本更稳定且样本效率更高。Anthropic 可能会通过其 API 提供这项服务，同时也效仿 OpenAI，正在积极招聘“前线部署工程师”，其职能很可能与后者的战略部署团队类似。

原文‘All three have more success then OpenAI and Anthropic so far in this market.’ 译文‘迄今为止，这三家公司在该市场上都比 OpenAI 和 Anthropic 取得了更大的成功。’ 将‘then’处理为比较级‘than’是正确的（原文疑似笔误）。但‘更大的成功’表述稍显绝对，原文‘more success’是比较级，译文准确。需确保比较对象是OpenAI和Anthropic的RFT服务，而非这两家公司的整体。结合上下文，此意已隐含。

paragraphs.source: Anthropic is bringing on large volumes of Trainium, which is economically attractive for RL in part due to low $/HBM. HBM generally contributes a large part of the chip’s BOM, but Amazon sourced it directly, reducing costs. RL workloads are mostly inference, which is memory bound. This means having a low TCO chip like Trainium positions customers in a place to make strong margins off this service if they optimize the throughput a sufficient amount.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Anthropic is bringing on large volumes of Trainium, which is economically attractive for RL in part due to low $/HBM. HBM generally contributes a large part of the chip’s BOM, but Amazon sourced it directly, reducing costs. RL workloads are mostly inference, which is memory bound. This means having a low TCO chip like Trainium positions customers in a place to make strong margins off this service if they optimize the throughput a sufficient amount.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Anthropic is bringing on large volumes of Trainium, which is economically attractive for RL in part due to low $/HBM. HBM generally contributes a large part of the chip’s BOM, but Amazon sourced it directly, reducing costs. RL workloads are mostly inference, which is memory bound. This means having a low TCO chip like Trainium positions customers in a place to make strong margins off this service if they optimize the throughput a sufficient amount.

pro.text: Anthropic 正在大规模引入 Trainium 芯片。这对 RL 工作负载而言具有经济吸引力，部分原因在于其较低的 $/HBM（高带宽内存）成本。HBM 通常占芯片物料清单的很大一部分，但亚马逊直接采购，从而降低了成本。RL 工作负载主要是受内存限制的推理任务。这意味着，如果客户能充分优化吞吐量，那么使用像 Trainium 这样总拥有成本较低的芯片，将能从此项服务中获取可观利润。

paragraphs.source: As noted, there is substantial upside in training custom models. One area in which we are particularly excited about is scientific discovery, within which custom models can make large amounts of progress.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: As noted, there is substantial upside in training custom models. One area in which we are particularly excited about is scientific discovery, within which custom models can make large amounts of progress.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: As noted, there is substantial upside in training custom models. One area in which we are particularly excited about is scientific discovery, within which custom models can make large amounts of progress.

pro.text: 如前所述，训练定制模型具有巨大的上升空间。我们特别看好的一个领域是科学发现，定制模型可以在该领域取得大量进展。

paragraphs.source: RL as a service is also offered by a number of other companies such as ThinkingMachines Tinker as well as Applied Compute and Adaptive ML. All three have more success then OpenAI and Anthropic so far in this market.

pro.text: 提供“RL即服务”的公司还包括 ThinkingMachines Tinker、Applied Compute 以及 Adaptive ML。迄今为止，这三家公司在“RL即服务”这一细分市场上，取得的进展都超过了OpenAI和Anthropic（的相关服务）。
